query: "gas prices" OR "gasoline prices" OR "oil prices" OR petrol

articles.title: Oil prices fall and markets rise on optimism over Iran ceasefire deal
articles.description: Markets rallied, and oil fell after reports that the United States and Iran had agreed in principle to extend their ceasefire, boosting hopes of a sustained de-escalation in the conflict.

articles.title: I asked ChatGPT: EV vs petrol - which really saves you more money? The answer isn’t what you expect
articles.description: Given the current fuel situation, if you drive a car, you’ve probably thought at least once, ‘An EV would have saved me a lot of money and protected me from rising fuel prices.’ But is that really true?

articles.title: Planning To Buy Tata Punch EV? Know These 5 Things That Really Matter
articles.description: The Tata Punch EV is an affordable electric SUV that appeals to first-time buyers and those transitioning from petrol vehicles. It offers two battery options and up to 468 km range. Here's all you need to know about the EV in detail., Car News, Times Now

articles.title: OTHERS SAY: A gas tax holiday is good politics but bad economics
articles.description: Even as the U.S. and Iran wrestle over an agreement to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, surging gas prices have turned the government's attention to a perennially popular fiscal scam: ease the pressure on household budgets with a gas tax holiday. In reality, such a plan to curry favor with voters would make them, all things considered, worse off.

articles.title: Japan, South Korea markets hit records on hopes for a winding down of the Iran war
articles.description: Markets in Japan and South Korea have hit fresh records as Asian shares advanced on expectations the U.S. and Iran will agree to extend the ceasefire in their war by 60 days. Oil prices slipped, but...

articles.title: RBI says West Asia war clouds growth outlook, but India remains relatively resilient
articles.description: RBI cautioned that a prolonged escalation of the war could hurt growth momentum and rekindle inflationary pressures through surging crude oil prices, volatile commodity markets and disruptions in shipping routes.

articles.title: West Asia crisis pose risks to growth, inflation in the short run, says RBI
articles.description: RBI says geopolitical tensions, elevated oil prices and supply chain disruptions could weigh on growth and inflation, though India's economic outlook remains positive

articles.title: Taxpayers Association seeks scrapping of additional VAT, cess on Andhra Pradesh fuel
articles.description: The Taxpayers' Association, Vijayawada, has urged the AP government to scrap the additional VAT and road development cess on petrol and diesel.
